name: RCS
description: Twilio RCS Business Messaging channel plugin for OpenClaw.

rcs.label: RCS
rcs.description: Twilio RCS Business Messaging channel: inbound webhooks and outbound rich replies with media and read receipts.

accountSid.label: Twilio Account SID
accountSid.help: Twilio Account SID used for RCS outbound API calls.

authToken.label: Twilio Auth Token
authToken.help: Twilio Auth Token used to sign webhook validation and RCS outbound API calls.

messagingServiceSid.label: Twilio Messaging Service SID
messagingServiceSid.help: Messaging Service whose sender pool contains the approved RCS Sender.

senderId.label: RCS Sender ID
senderId.help: Optional Twilio RCS Sender agent id, for example "rcs:myagent_abc123_agent". Used as From for direct sends without a Messaging Service.

transport.label: RCS Transport Mode
transport.help: "rcs-only" (default) targets rcs:+E164 with no SMS fallback; "rcs-preferred" lets Twilio fall back to SMS/MMS when RCS cannot deliver.

defaultTo.label: RCS Default To Number
defaultTo.help: Optional default outbound phone number used when a send flow omits an explicit RCS target.

publicWebhookUrl.label: RCS Public Webhook URL
publicWebhookUrl.help: Public URL configured in Twilio for incoming messages. Must match Twilio's signed URL exactly.

webhookPath.label: RCS Webhook Path
webhookPath.help: Gateway HTTP path that receives Twilio incoming-message webhooks. Use a distinct path per account.

sharedWebhookPath.label: Shared Twilio Webhook Path
sharedWebhookPath.help: Optional public SMS/RCS Twilio webhook path used when an existing Messaging Service posts both SMS and RCS to the same URL.

sharedWebhookPublicUrl.label: Shared Twilio Public Webhook URL
sharedWebhookPublicUrl.help: Public URL Twilio signs for the shared SMS/RCS webhook path. Used only by the shared webhook router.

smsForwardWebhookPath.label: SMS Forward Webhook Path
smsForwardWebhookPath.help: Internal Gateway path for non-RCS payloads forwarded by the shared webhook router.

statusCallbacks.label: RCS Status Callbacks
statusCallbacks.help: Request Twilio delivery/read status callbacks for outbound RCS messages. Defaults on when publicWebhookUrl is set; set false to disable.

dmPolicy.label: RCS DM Policy
dmPolicy.help: Direct RCS access control ("pairing" recommended). "open" requires channels.rcs.allowFrom=["*"].

allowFrom.label: RCS Allow From
allowFrom.help: Allowed sender phone numbers in E.164 format, or * when dmPolicy is open.

textChunkLimit.label: RCS Text Chunk Limit
textChunkLimit.help: Maximum characters per outbound RCS chunk before OpenClaw splits long replies (capped at Twilio's 1,600-character message body limit).
